attributes.description: Alerts when `envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters > 0` persists. Clusters stuck warming cannot route requests.
attributes.name: [Envoy OTel] Warming clusters stuck

investigation_guide.blob:
## Envoy warming clusters stuck

### What fired
`envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters` remained above 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Clusters warm when Envoy is awaiting DNS/EDS responses for their endpoints. Stuck warming means endpoints cannot route, effectively taking the upstream offline.

### Triage
1. Inspect admin `/clusters` for the stuck cluster name.
2. Check DNS resolution / EDS connectivity from the Envoy pod.
3. Look for recent CDS/EDS push failures.

### Remediation
- Fix DNS / control-plane connectivity.
- Push a correct cluster config.

### Tuning
- Fires on any sustained value > 0.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL
// Warming clusters should drop to 0 after config load; sustained > 0 indicates config issues
| STATS max_warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters)
| WHERE max_warming > 0
